title: Millennium Fist
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Otheruses|Fist}}
[[File:MillenniumFist.jpg|thumb|250px|The ''Millennium Fist'']]

The '''''Millennium Fist''''' was a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] with two giant green gloves on its front. It was allegedly an old ship of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] that [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] kept lying around on [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]]. However, the ''Millennium Fist'' was in fact just a parody of the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], invented by Han Solo while telling a story to his son [[Anakin Solo|Anakin]].

*{{Tales|8|The Secret Tales of Luke's Hand!}} {{1st}} {{Flash}}
